intro: A memory from the future, rewound: outcomes first, then the builds that earn them.

milestones.headline: Dual-brand education on one hardened spine
milestones.metric: One deploy, two hosts — brand-scoped Convex, WorkOS, Stripe
milestones.body: Oddech and Re4matik never fork auth or entitlements. Middleware keeps hosts honest; Playwright keeps checkout and lesson gates honest.

milestones.headline: Retail floors run on variant-native inventory
milestones.metric: TV, counter, and audits share one subscription graph
milestones.body: Strengths and salts are modeled as data, not spreadsheet hacks. Stockouts vanish from public menus the moment counts hit zero.

milestones.headline: Messenger as a user-owned surface
milestones.metric: 17+ themes + receipt control without a fragile shell
milestones.body: Electron + guarded IPC let the renderer experiment while auto-update and notifications stay boring — the way infrastructure should be.
